qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: SQL allows duplicate tuples in relations, and correspondingly defines the multiplicity of tuples in the result of joins. Which one of the following queries always gives the same answer as the nested query shown below: select * from R where a in (select S.a from S) A. select R.* from R, S where R.a=S
